name: Saint du Pont
description:
French Mafia Member is in Love With You (GONE WRONG?!) (GONE SEXUAL!!??)

I've got a case of the brainrot over mafia guys right now, I don't have an excuse for myself. I'm testing something with my card designs, so be patient with me yall. He's written to be totally obsessed and stalker-ish with you cause I needed a self-indulgent bot and who doesn't love a crazy, devoted man? 😇

TW: Obviously all the triggers related to mafia/organized crime. So violence, drugs, weapons, etc. Also warnings for obsessive and stalker behavior. JLLM gets crazy sometimes so just be wary. If you know any of these things bother you, don't interact! Your mental health comes first.

NOTES: I have his twin genned and his personality done, I'm just not sure what to do for a scenario for him. I'm also considering making a duo bot cause who doesn't want to be sandwiched between two dangerous men?

[Pic has been returned]
